# allinkl_mail_account (Resource)

Manages a mailbox hosted at all-inkl.com (KAS).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "allinkl_mail_account" "info" {
  local_part     = "info"
  domain         = "example.com"
  password       = var.mailbox_password
  copy_addresses = ["archive@example.org"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) Domain part of the address. Must be hosted in the KAS account. Changing it forces a new mailbox.
- `local_part` (String) Part of the address before the `@`. Changing it forces a new mailbox.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Mailbox password. Write-only: the KAS API never returns passwords, so drift in the password is not detectable; changing the value here updates it. Prefer passing it via a variable with `sensitive = true` and note that, as with all Terraform secrets, the value is stored in the state file — protect your state accordingly.

### Optional

- `copy_addresses` (List of String) Addresses that receive a copy of every incoming mail.

### Read-Only

- `address` (String) Full primary address (`local_part@domain`).
- `id` (String) KAS-assigned mail login, e.g. `m1234567`.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import allinkl_mail_account.info m1234567
```
